actions.expression:
SELECT kpnr.kpsh,kpnr.sid 
FROM kpnr 
WHERE (kpnr.wfgs=[浙里办票在线发票.购货单位]) 
ORDER BY kpnr.sid DESC LIMIT 1

fields.caption: 数量

actions.expression:
SELECT kaiptzsheet1.sid,
       kaiptzsheet1.pid,
       kaiptz.chrq,
       kaiptz.wstt,
       kaiptzsheet1.zsl,
       kaiptzsheet1.zzsl,
       kaiptzsheet1.zwpm,
       kaiptzsheet1.hgjldw,
       kaiptzsheet1.bgsl,
       kaiptzsheet1.sjkpze,
       kaiptzsheet1.kpxh,
       kaiptzsheet1.cghbdm,
       kaiptzsheet1.ywrya,
       kaiptzsheet1.fphm,
       kaiptzsheet1.ysfp,
       kaiptzsheet1.dpdd,
       kaiptzsheet1.sccj,
       kaiptzsheet1.kpwy,
       kaiptzsheet1.gczj,
       kaiptzsheet1.ywbm,
       kaiptzsheet1.kpgc,
       kaiptzsheet1.cght,
       kaiptzsheet1.bzsm,
       kaiptzsheet1.sfdh,
       kaiptzsheet1.gzsh,
       kaiptzsheet1.cz,
       kaiptzsheet1.fkxq,
       kaiptzsheet1.szxq,
       kaiptzsheet1.dq,
       kaiptzsheet1.zkfy1,
       kaiptzsheet1.chsl
FROM kaiptz,kaiptzsheet1 
WHERE (kaiptz.rid=kaiptzsheet1.pid) 
  AND (kaiptzsheet1.sjkpze=[浙里办票在线发票.开票金额]) 
  AND (kaiptzsheet1.bgsl=[浙里办票在线发票.数量]) 
  AND ((kaiptzsheet1.sfdp<>"是") 
  OR (kaiptzsheet1.sfdp is null)) 
ORDER BY kaiptzsheet1.sid ASC

fields.caption: 出口货物报关单号
fields.output: 浙里办票在线发票.出口货物报关单号

actions.expression:
SELECT kaiptzsheet1.sid,
       kaiptzsheet1.pid,
       kaiptz.chrq,
       kaiptz.wstt,
       kaiptzsheet1.zsl,
       kaiptzsheet1.zzsl,
       kaiptzsheet1.zwpm,
       kaiptzsheet1.hgjldw,
       kaiptzsheet1.bgsl,
       kaiptzsheet1.sjkpze,
       kaiptzsheet1.kpxh,
       kaiptzsheet1.cghbdm,
       kaiptzsheet1.ywrya,
       kaiptzsheet1.fphm,
       kaiptzsheet1.ysfp,
       kaiptzsheet1.dpdd,
       kaiptzsheet1.sccj,
       kaiptzsheet1.kpwy,
       kaiptzsheet1.gczj,
       kaiptzsheet1.ywbm,
       kaiptzsheet1.kpgc,
       kaiptzsheet1.cght,
       kaiptzsheet1.bzsm,
       kaiptzsheet1.sfdh,
       kaiptzsheet1.gzsh,
       kaiptzsheet1.cz,
       kaiptzsheet1.fkxq,
       kaiptzsheet1.szxq,
       kaiptzsheet1.dq,
       kaiptzsheet1.zkfy1,
       kaiptzsheet1.chsl,
       kaiptzsheet1.ckhwbgdh
FROM kaiptz,kaiptzsheet1 
WHERE (kaiptz.rid=kaiptzsheet1.pid) 
  AND (kaiptz.kpgc like concat("%",[浙里办票在线发票.开票工厂],"%")) 
  AND ((kaiptzsheet1.sfdp<>"是") 
  OR (kaiptzsheet1.sfdp is null)) 
ORDER BY kaiptzsheet1.sid ASC

FROM kaiptzsheet1 
WHERE (kaiptzsheet1.kpxh=[浙里办票在线发票.开票序号])

actions.expression:
SELECT kaiptz.rid 
FROM kaiptz 
WHERE (kaiptz.rid=[浙里办票在线发票.开票通知number]) 
ORDER BY kaiptz.rid ASC

caption: 浙里办票在线发票

view.params:
SELECT kpnr.SID,kpnr.wfgs
FROM kpnr
WHERE   (kpnr.kpsh<>"") and (kpnr.kpsh is not null)
ORDER BY kpnr.SID ASC

name: 浙里办票在线发票
title_field: 浙里办票在线发票.发票号码
